message:
feat(indexer): refactor lexical rebuild checkpoint persistence and add asset-state consistency validation

Decouples the lexical rebuild checkpoint completion logic from the storage
handle so it can be driven by observed state rather than requiring a live
database connection, reducing lock contention during post-index maintenance.

Checkpoint refactoring (src/indexer/mod.rs):
- Rename refresh_completed_lexical_rebuild_checkpoint to
  persist_completed_lexical_rebuild_checkpoint_from_observations, taking
  pre-computed db state and total message count instead of a storage ref
- Extract database state observations (conversation count, message count,
  storage fingerprint) into the caller so they happen under a shorter lock
  window before checkpoint persistence
- Pre-compute reported_processed_conversations and reported_indexed_docs
  in load_lexical_rebuild_checkpoint to avoid redundant method calls
- Add tracing spans with timing to the checkpoint completion path for
  observability into post-index maintenance cost

FTS maintenance hardening (src/indexer/mod.rs):
- Expand the post-index FTS repair to verify that the actual FTS row count
  matches the expected message count, triggering a full rebuild when they
  diverge (handles cases where incremental catch-up missed rows)
- Add an explicit FTS-never-populated fast path that skips repair when the
  FTS rebuild generation marker is absent, avoiding unnecessary work on
  fresh databases

Asset state module (src/search/asset_state.rs, src/lib.rs):
- Add asset consistency validation that cross-checks the Tantivy index
  document count against the SQLite message count, logging warnings when
  they diverge beyond a configurable threshold
- Re-export asset_state module from lib.rs for downstream test access

CLI index tests (tests/cli_index.rs):
- Add tests for incremental index consistency after schema-corrupting
  operations followed by recovery
- Add tests for the checkpoint completion path verifying that completed
  checkpoints are persisted with correct total counts

E2E search index tests (tests/e2e_search_index.rs):
- Expand the FTS repair test to verify exact row count after repair
- Add test for the asset state cross-check reporting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
